title: Figure 2 in Detection of the amoeba Entamoeba gingivalis in periodontal pockets
author: Bonner, Mark
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2. Specificity and sensitivity of Entamoeba gingivalis- specific primers. Agarose gel-resolved products from single-round PCR using 1 ng E. moshkovskii, 1 ng E. histolytica and 100 fg–100 ng E. gingivalis patient #0 DNA. Amplification was not obtained in control without matrix (H2O), E. moshkovskii, E. histolytica and up to 10 pg patient #0 DNA.
steps_raw: Figure 2. Specificity and sensitivity of Entamoeba gingivalis- specific primers. Agarose gel-resolved products from single-round PCR using 1 ng E. moshkovskii, 1 ng E. histolytica and 100 fg–100 ng E. gingivalis patient #0 DNA. Amplification was not obtained in control without matrix (H2O), E. moshkovskii, E. histolytica and up to 10 pg patient #0 DNA.
